description: A semi-realistic survival experience. Build a town, find employment, develop industry, and coordinate city planning. Mechanics, community, and hard work.

features.title: Employment & Labor
features.description: Take on specific roles. Specialized tools and economics make every job essential to the town.

features.title: Heavy Industry
features.description: Design assembly lines and process raw materials. Automation is grounded and requires planning.

features.title: City Planning
features.description: Use books and sketch out roads and road networks. Gather in teams and build your roads by hand.

footerNote: Not affiliated with Mojang AB. Built for our community.
